scores.correctness_notes: Core structure (containers + resources linkage, type: oci-image) is correct. However, description is marked as Required (✅) when the gold standard says it's optional. The filename field (only for file type, not oci-image) is not mentioned.
scores.hallucination_notes: The extensive CLI section (upload-resource with --image OCI digest, resource-revisions, set-resource-architectures) is not in the gold standard and cannot be verified — these may be real charmcraft commands but their accuracy (especially flags and subcommands) is unverifiable and potentially fabricated. Description field incorrectly marked as required.
